global.knight_description: A tall medieval knight in full plate armor, dinged and battle-worn gray steel, fully enclosed helmet with a narrow visor slit, wearing a very long flowing red commander’s cloak that reaches nearly to the ground, heavy plate pauldrons, chainmail underlayer, realistic weight and bulk, no visible face.
global.style: Boxy pixel-art style, thick chunky pixel clusters, slightly gritty textures, warm tones, dramatic directional lighting, subtle color banding, classic 16-bit fantasy aesthetic.
